name: @ts-fix/rules-async-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's `async` rule category (7 rules: 4 SYN — no-async-promise-executor, no-await-in-loop, no-return-await, require-await; 3 TYP — await-thenable, no-floating-promises, no-misused-promises). Pure AST/type-aware predicates on the @ts-fix/rules-core-effect substrate (defineRule/runRule/runTypeAwareRule), consuming the canonical Diagnostic/RuleMeta/Fix/TextEdit from @ts-fix/contracts-effect. no-floating-promises is the ONLY catalog rule that emits a real `fix` (RULE-025). Plain-TS visitors over the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (sync AST walk).
